name: com.coachfit.shared.adapter.in.security.SecurityConfig
comment:
Core Spring Security configuration for CoachFit.

Filter chain order (docs/08-auth-model.md §Spring Security Filter Chain)

 Request → CorsFilter                     (Spring Security built-in via corsConfigurationSource) → JwtAuthenticationFilter      (order 1 — extract + validate JWT) → ApiKeyAuthenticationFilter (order 2 — fallback if no JWT) → FeatureGateFilter        (order 3 — tier-change blacklist + @RequiresTier) → RateLimitFilter        (order 4 — Redis daily counter + headers) → Controller

Public endpoints (no auth required)

  • {@code POST /api/v1/auth/**} — register, login, refresh, OAuth callbacks
  • {@code GET /api/v1/auth/**} — OAuth initiation flows
  • {@code POST /api/v1/webhooks/**} — Strava, Garmin, Stripe webhooks
  • {@code GET /api/v1/webhooks/**} — Strava webhook verification
  • {@code GET /join/**} — public athlete invite-link acceptance
  • {@code GET /actuator/health} — liveness / readiness probes

methods.name: corsConfigurationSource
methods.comment: CORS configuration sourced from {@code app.url} (docs/08-auth-model.md §Security Checklist: "CORS — Whitelist frontend domain only").

methods.name: passwordEncoder
methods.comment: BCrypt with strength 12 (docs/08-auth-model.md §Security Checklist: "Password storage — BCrypt (strength 12)").

methods.name: restClient
methods.comment: Shared {@link RestClient} instance used by {@code GoogleOAuthService} to call Google's token and userinfo endpoints.

name: com.coachfit.shared.adapter.in.security.ratelimit.RateLimitFilter
comment:
Last filter in the CoachFit security chain — enforces per-user daily request limits.

Rate limits by tier (docs/08-auth-model.md)

 free   → 500  req/day pro    → 5,000 req/day elite  → 20,000 req/day coach  → 20,000 req/day

Redis key pattern (docs/08-auth-model.md)

 rate_limit:{userId}:{YYYY-MM-DD}   → counter (INCR), TTL 86400s

Response headers set on every authenticated response

  • {@code X-RateLimit-Limit} — tier limit
  • {@code X-RateLimit-Remaining} — requests remaining today
  • {@code X-RateLimit-Reset} — UTC epoch second of next day midnight

Unauthenticated requests are skipped (per-endpoint limits for login/register/webhooks are handled inside the respective feature-module controllers).
